x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan
x-enumeration-literals.description: Loan is a debt instrument where the lender is a financial institution and where the debt is not traded on the market.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bond
x-enumeration-literals.description: Bond is a debt that is traded on the bond market, the lender is not necessarily a financial institution, but one or more investors (a kind of crowd funding)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Deposit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Deposits are standard, non-negotiable contracts open to the public at large that
allow the placements of variable amounts of funds and the later withdrawal. 
https://www.elibrary.imf.org/view/IMF069/22606-9781513579191/22606-9781513579191/ch04.xml
